results.title: Kendra Wilkinson Blasts People Telling Her to ‘Downsize’ Breast Implants
results.description: Kendra Wilkinson is firing back after body-shamers suggested she ‘downsize’ her breast implants. The former Playboy model, 40, posted about her weight-loss journey via an Instagram post on Tuesday, May 26, prompting some of her followers to offer up unsolicited advice about the size of her bust. “Month two on my GLP-1 journey and I’m [...]

results.title: Trump tells agencies to align with study calling for narrower childhood vaccine recommendations
Did Riyan Parag scold Vaibhav Sooryavanshi? Viral video sparks debate after RR's IPL exit
results.description: A viral video showing Riyan Parag's animated conversation with emotional teen star Vaibhav Sooryavanshi after Rajasthan Royals' IPL 2026 exit has sparked debate among cricket fans.

results.title: “Star Wars” Editor Marcia Lucas Has Died
results.description: Oscar-winning film editor Marcia Lucas, ex-wife of filmmaker George Lucas and the editor of the original “Star Wars,” has died. She was 80. Lucas reportedly passed away on Wednesday in Rancho Mirage, California, from cancer. Following an apprenticeship program, she became the assistant to lauded “Jaws” editor Verna Fields and assisted on editing films like [...] The post “Star Wars” Editor Marcia Lucas Has Died appeared first on Dark Horizons .
